# ghentapi Provider

Provider for managing GitHub organisations via the GitHub REST API, authenticating as a GitHub App.

## Example Usage

```terraform
terraform {
  required_version = "~> 1.11"
  required_providers {
    ghentapi = {
      source  = "kreemer/ghentapi"
      version = "~> 1.0"
    }
  }
}

provider "ghentapi" {
  base_url = "https://api.github.com"

  enterprise_app_id              = var.ent_app_id
  enterprise_app_installation_id = var.ent_app_installation_id
  enterprise_app_pem_file        = var.ent_pem

  org_app_id        = var.org_app_id
  org_app_client_id = var.org_app_client_id
  org_app_pem_file  = var.org_pem

  # Automatically installs the org app into new organisations on first use.
  auto_install_org_app = true
  repository_selection = "all"
}

variable "ent_app_id" {
  type = string
}

variable "ent_app_installation_id" {
  type = string
}

variable "ent_pem" {
  type      = string
  sensitive = true
}

variable "org_app_id" {
  type = string
}

variable "org_app_client_id" {
  type = string
}

variable "org_pem" {
  type      = string
  sensitive = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `enterprise_app_id` (String) App ID of the enterprise-level GitHub App used to install org-level apps.
- `enterprise_app_installation_id` (String) Installation ID of the enterprise-level GitHub App.
- `enterprise_app_pem_file` (String, Sensitive) PEM-encoded RSA private key for the enterprise-level GitHub App.
- `org_app_client_id` (String) Client ID of the org-level GitHub App. Required for installing the app into organisations.
- `org_app_id` (String) App ID of the org-level GitHub App used to manage organisation settings.
- `org_app_pem_file` (String, Sensitive) PEM-encoded RSA private key for the org-level GitHub App.

### Optional

- `auto_install_org_app` (Boolean) When `true` (default), the org-level GitHub App is installed automatically into an organisation the first time a resource targets it. When `false`, an error is returned if the app is not already installed.
- `base_url` (String) GitHub API base URL. Use `https://api.github.com` for GitHub.com or `https://{hostname}/api/v3` for GitHub Enterprise Server. Defaults to `https://api.github.com`.
- `repository_selection` (String) Repository selection used when auto-installing the org app. Must be `all` or `selected`. Defaults to `all`.
